page.primary_keyword: marbella yacht charter stag weekend activities
page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter Stag Weekend Activities: Top Onboard Fun & Extras

data.meta_description: Discover top marbella yacht charter stag weekend activities with onboard fun & extras. Jet skis, BBQs, and more from €749. Book your ultimate party today.
data.summary: Plan the ultimate stag party with marbella yacht charter stag weekend activities including jet skis, DJ decks, and gourmet BBQs. Our fleet departs Puerto Banús with all-inclusive packages from €749.
key_facts: Charters from €749/2h (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39) including skipper, drinks, snacks, and VAT.
Mangusta 80 (24m) from €4,719/4h with a free jet ski included.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%).
Onboard extras: jet skis, paddleboards, inflatable slides, DJ equipment, BBQ setups.
Maximum 12 guests per boat; smaller groups can charter Dubhe (5 pax) or Mariah SX21 (5 pax).
Depart from Puerto Banús; popular stops include Cala del Faro, Cabopino, and Marbella Marina.
Book via WhatsApp for custom extras like catering, photographers, or themed decorations.

faq.q: What is included in a stag weekend yacht charter?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You can add extras like jet skis, BBQ, DJ, or a photographer.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and drinks?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. However, our standard package already includes drinks and snacks. For larger groups, we recommend our BBQ or catering upgrades.

faq.q: How many guests can join a stag yacht charter?
faq.a: Our fleet accommodates 5 to 12 guests. For a stag party of 10–12, choose the Mangusta 80 (12 pax), Azimut 58 Flybridge (12 pax), or Ferretti 94 (12 pax). Smaller groups can use the Dubhe (5 pax) or Mariah SX21 (5 pax).

faq.q: Do you provide jet skis or water toys?
faq.a: Yes. The Mangusta 80 (all variants) includes a free jet ski for charters of 4 hours or more. Other boats can add jet skis, paddleboards, inflatable slides, or towable bananas for an extra fee.

faq.q: Can we play music or have a DJ on board?
faq.a: Absolutely. Most yachts have premium sound systems. You can bring your own playlist or hire a DJ. We can arrange a DJ deck and speakers for an additional cost.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for stag charters?
faq.a: Cancellations made 7 days or more before departure receive a full refund. Within 7 days, a 50% charge applies. No-shows or same-day cancellations are non-refundable. Weather-related cancellations are rescheduled.

faq.q: Where do we depart from and what are the best spots?
faq.a: All charters depart from Puerto Banús. Popular stag stops include Cala del Faro for swimming, Cabopino for beach clubs, and Marbella Marina for lunch. We can also anchor off the Golden Mile for sunset.

faq.q: How do I book a stag yacht charter with extras?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp to check availability and discuss extras. We'll tailor the package to your group size, budget, and preferences. Pricing for custom extras is provided on request.

data.body_html:
Planning a stag do in Marbella? A marbella yacht charter stag weekend activities package is the ultimate way to celebrate. From jet skis and DJ decks to gourmet BBQs and sunset cocktails, our fleet departs Puerto Banús with everything included. Start at €749 for 2 hours and upgrade with adrenaline-packed extras. Here's how to make your stag weekend unforgettable.

Why Choose a Yacht Charter for a Stag Weekend?

Marbella's coastline offers 27 km of golden beaches, hidden coves, and vibrant beach clubs. A private yacht gives you total freedom: anchor at Cala del Faro for cliff jumping, drop anchor off Cabopino for paddleboarding, or cruise past the Golden Mile with a drink in hand. With a licensed skipper, you focus on the party while we handle navigation and safety.

Top Onboard Activities for Stag Groups

Our most popular marbella yacht charter stag weekend activities include:

  • Jet Skiing: Free on Mangusta 80 charters (4h+). Add a jet ski to any other boat from €200/hour.
  • Inflatable Water Toys: Towable bananas, doughnuts, and inflatable slides – perfect for group laughs.
  • DJ Decks & Sound Systems: Bring your own playlist or hire a professional DJ. Most yachts have Bluetooth speakers; premium boats have full sound systems.
  • BBQ on Board: Our chefs can prepare a gourmet BBQ with fresh seafood, meats, and salads. Add from €35/person.
  • Swimming & Snorkelling: Stop at Cala Cortés or the crystal-clear waters off Estepona. Snorkelling gear provided.
  • Sunset Cruise: Watch the sun dip behind La Concha mountain while sipping cava. Ideal for the groom's final toast.

Our Fleet for Stag Parties

Choose the right boat for your group size and vibe. All depart from Puerto Banús.

BoatLengthMax GuestsStarting PriceBest For
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2hIntimate groups, budget-friendly
Azimut 3912.5m11€749/2hLarger groups on a budget
Mangusta 8024m12€4,719/4hLuxury + free jet ski
Ferretti 9429m12On requestUltra-luxury, space
Dubhe8m5On requestSmall stag groups

For full fleet details, visit our boat rental Marbella page.

How to Book Extras

All our charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT. To add extras like jet skis, BBQ, DJ, photographer, or themed decorations, contact us via WhatsApp. We'll customise the package and provide a quote. Popular upgrades for stag weekends:

  • Photographer/Videographer: Capture the memories – from €250 for 2 hours.
  • Party Decorations: Balloons, banners, and custom bunting – from €50.
  • Gourmet Catering: Upgrade from light snacks to a full sit-down meal – from €45/person.
  • Champagne Bar: Add a bottle of Moët or Dom Pérignon – from €80.

Best Itineraries for a Stag Yacht Charter

Our skippers know the coast inside out. Here are three popular routes:

  • Puerto Banús to Cala del Faro (2 hours): Quick cruise, cliff jumping, and a swim stop. Perfect for a short charter.
  • Marbella to Cabopino (4 hours): Anchor at Cabopino beach, use the paddleboards, and enjoy a BBQ lunch.
  • Estepona & Sotogrande (8 hours): Full-day trip to Estepona's old town, lunch at a chiringuito, and sunset in Sotogrande.

For more ideas, read our Marbella yacht charter itineraries guide.

What's Included in Every Charter

No hidden costs. Every booking includes:

  • Licensed skipper (English & Spanish speaking)
  • Fuel for the entire trip
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks (olives, crisps, nuts)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

All prices are final. No surprise fees at the end.

Why Book with Boat Rental Marbella?

We are a local company based in Puerto Banús with over 10 years of experience. Our fleet is well-maintained, and our skippers are professional and fun. We offer transparent pricing, no hidden extras, and flexible booking. Check out our stag weekend guide for more tips.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in a stag weekend yacht charter?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You can add extras like jet skis, BBQ, DJ, or a photographer.

Can we bring our own food and drinks?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. However, our standard package already includes drinks and snacks. For larger groups, we recommend our BBQ or catering upgrades.

How many guests can join a stag yacht charter?

Our fleet accommodates 5 to 12 guests. For a stag party of 10–12, choose the Mangusta 80 (12 pax), Azimut 58 Flybridge (12 pax), or Ferretti 94 (12 pax). Smaller groups can use the Dubhe (5 pax) or Mariah SX21 (5 pax).

Do you provide jet skis or water toys?

Yes. The Mangusta 80 (all variants) includes a free jet ski for charters of 4 hours or more. Other boats can add jet skis, paddleboards, inflatable slides, or towable bananas for an extra fee.

Can we play music or have a DJ on board?

Absolutely. Most yachts have premium sound systems. You can bring your own playlist or hire a DJ. We can arrange a DJ deck and speakers for an additional cost.

What is the cancellation policy for stag charters?

Cancellations made 7 days or more before departure receive a full refund. Within 7 days, a 50% charge applies. No-shows or same-day cancellations are non-refundable. Weather-related cancellations are rescheduled.

Where do we depart from and what are the best spots?

All charters depart from Puerto Banús. Popular stag stops include Cala del Faro for swimming, Cabopino for beach clubs, and Marbella Marina for lunch. We can also anchor off the Golden Mile for sunset.

How do I book a stag yacht charter with extras?

Contact us via WhatsApp to check availability and discuss extras. We'll tailor the package to your group size, budget, and preferences. Pricing for custom extras is provided on request.
